articles.description: Follow build-up to two Champions League quarter-final second legs, as Arsenal host Sporting and Bayern Munich face Real Madrid.
articles.title: Champions League quarter-finals LIVE: Arsenal vs Sporting CP & Real Madrid vs Bayern Munich scores, radio commentary, updates & stats

articles.description: Manchester United defender Harry Maguire will miss Saturday's trip to Chelsea after receiving an additional one-match ban.
articles.title: Harry Maguire to miss Chelsea after Man Utd man gets further ban

articles.description: England captain Ben Stokes says he "got out quite lucky" with major facial surgery after an incident in the nets at Durham.
articles.title: Ben Stokes: England captain 'might not be here' after being hit in face by ball

articles.description: Liverpool's exit from the Champions League was hastened by a VAR intervention. BBC Sport analyses the key refereeing decisions in their season.
articles.title: Liverpool: Arne Slot says VAR has gone against his side this season - is he right?

articles.description: With Vincent Kompany making an impressive impact at Bayern Munich, BBC Sport's tactics expert Umir Irfan takes a closer look at the manager's unique style.
articles.title: Is Vincent Kompany providing a glimpse into football after Pep Guardiola?

articles.description: France forward Hugo Ekitike is expected to miss the World Cup after suffering a suspected Achilles injury during Liverpool's Champions League defeat by Paris St-Germain.
articles.title: Hugo Ekitike set to miss World Cup as Liverpool fear lengthy lay-off

articles.description: Jamie Murray, who became the first British doubles player to rise to world number one, has announced his retirement from tennis.
articles.title: British doubles legend Jamie Murray retires from tennis

articles.description: BBC Sport explores John Terry's imminent takeover of Colchester, why ex-pros are buying clubs, and what the feeling is among fans
articles.title: John Terry Colchester takeover: What's in it for him?

articles.description: England rugby star Ellie Kildunne reveals she suffered from disordered eating and body dysmorphia during the coronavirus lockdown.
articles.title: Ellie Kildunne: World Cup winner reveals disordered eating and body dysmorphia struggle

articles.description: World number two Carlos Alcaraz pulls out of the Barcelona Open with an injury to his right wrist, one month before the start of his French Open defence.
articles.title: Barcelona Open: Carlos Alcaraz pulls out of tournament with wrist injury
